note: Every transcription-corroborated/conflict/insufficient survey transition NOT promoted to the machine tier, with the reason. Together with elements-machine.provenance.json this is the Phase B audit surface.

reasons.already-curated: transition exists in a curated element file (additive-only)
reasons.context-undeterminable: no NIST-evaluated value; material class not recoverable, so rule 2 cannot fire
reasons.evaluated-not-corroborated: starred value not in the dual-corroborated agreed-set
reasons.conflict: Stage-9 tier: legacy disagrees with NIST (e.g. oxide vs metal / Auger-frame)
reasons.insufficient-evidence: Stage-9 tier: not recoverable in both extractions
reasons.no-evaluated-value: coverage-expansion: artifact fetched but no NIST-evaluated (starred) photoelectron line — nothing sourceable to emit (e.g. Rb, Cs)
reasons.already-machine-tier: coverage-expansion: subshell already emitted by the Stage-9 tiers-driven machine path (additive-only)
